    • org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql.CqlConstantType.Regex
      Modifier and Type
      Constant Field
      Value
      public static final String
      BLOB_REGEX
      "(?i)0[x](0-9a-f)+"
      public static final String
      BOOLEAN_REGEX
      "(?i)true|false"
      public static final String
      FLOAT_REGEX
      "(\\-?[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]*)?([eE][+-]?[0-9+])?)|NaN|Infinity"
      public static final String
      INTEGER_REGEX
      "\\-?[0-9]+"
      public static final String
      STRING_REGEX
      "\'((?:[^\']+|\'\')*)\'"
      public static final String
      UUID_REGEX
      "(?i)[0-9a-f]{8}+\\-[0-9a-f]{4}+\\-[0-9a-f]{4}+\\-[0-9a-f]{4}+\\-[0-9a-f]{12}+"

      Constant Field
      Value
      public static final boolean
      DEFAULT_DURABLE_WRITES
      true

      Modifier and Type
      Constant Field
      Value
      public static final String
      DEFAULT_BLOCK_COMMENT_END_DELIMITER
      "*/"
      public static final String
      DEFAULT_BLOCK_COMMENT_START_DELIMITER
      "/*"
      public static final String
      DEFAULT_COMMENT_PREFIX
      "--"
      public static final String
